name: homesafe
description: HomeSafe - React TypeScript frontend and Spring Boot migration for finding safe rental housing for refugees and internally displaced persons.

scripts.db:generate: node -e "console.log('Legacy Node backend was removed. Use backend-java and start the Spring Boot app instead.')"
scripts.db:migrate: node -e "console.log('No npm migration step is configured for backend-java. Start PostgreSQL with Docker and run the Spring Boot backend from backend-java.')"
scripts.db:seed: node -e "console.log('Demo admin/source seeding now happens from backend-java on application startup.')"
